Files

wasmer/entities/external/extref/
inner.rs

1use std::any::Any;
2
3use crate::StoreRef;
4use crate::entities::store::{AsStoreMut, AsStoreRef};
5use crate::macros::backend::{gen_rt_ty, match_rt};
6use crate::vm::VMExternRef;
7
8gen_rt_ty! {
9    #[derive(derive_more::From, Debug, Clone)]
10    pub(crate) BackendExternRef(entities::external::ExternRef);
11}
12
13impl BackendExternRef {
14    /// Make a new extern reference
15    #[inline]
16    pub fn new<T>(store: &mut impl AsStoreMut, value: T) -> Self
17    where
18        T: Any + Send + Sync + 'static + Sized,
19    {
20        match &store.as_store_mut().inner.store {
21            #[cfg(feature = "sys")]
22            crate::BackendStore::Sys(s) => Self::Sys(
23                crate::backend::sys::entities::external::ExternRef::new(store, value),
24            ),
25            #[cfg(feature = "v8")]
26            crate::BackendStore::V8(s) => Self::V8(
27                crate::backend::v8::entities::external::ExternRef::new(store, value),
28            ),
29            #[cfg(feature = "js")]
30            crate::BackendStore::Js(s) => Self::Js(
31                crate::backend::js::entities::external::ExternRef::new(store, value),
32            ),
33        }
34    }
35
36    /// Try to downcast to the given value.
37    #[inline]
38    pub fn downcast<'a, T>(&self, store: &'a impl AsStoreRef) -> Option<&'a T>
39    where
40        T: Any + Send + Sync + 'static + Sized,
41    {
42        match_rt!(on self => r {
43            r.downcast::<T>(store)
44        })
45    }
46
47    /// Create a [`VMExternRef`] from [`Self`].
48    #[inline]
49    pub(crate) fn vm_externref(&self) -> VMExternRef {
50        match self {
51            #[cfg(feature = "sys")]
52            Self::Sys(r) => VMExternRef::Sys(r.vm_externref()),
53            #[cfg(feature = "v8")]
54            Self::V8(r) => VMExternRef::V8(r.vm_externref()),
55            #[cfg(feature = "js")]
56            Self::Js(r) => VMExternRef::Js(r.vm_externref()),
57        }
58    }
59
60    /// Create an instance of [`Self`] from a [`VMExternRef`].
61    #[inline]
62    pub(crate) unsafe fn from_vm_externref(
63        store: &mut impl AsStoreMut,
64        vm_externref: VMExternRef,
65    ) -> Self {
66        match &store.as_store_mut().inner.store {
67            #[cfg(feature = "sys")]
68            crate::BackendStore::Sys(_) => Self::Sys(unsafe {
69                crate::backend::sys::entities::external::ExternRef::from_vm_externref(
70                    store,
71                    vm_externref.unwrap_sys(),
72                )
73            }),
74            #[cfg(feature = "v8")]
75            crate::BackendStore::V8(_) => Self::V8(unsafe {
76                crate::backend::v8::entities::external::ExternRef::from_vm_externref(
77                    store,
78                    vm_externref.unwrap_v_8(),
79                )
80            }),
81            #[cfg(feature = "js")]
82            crate::BackendStore::Js(_) => Self::Js(unsafe {
83                crate::backend::js::entities::external::ExternRef::from_vm_externref(
84                    store,
85                    vm_externref.unwrap_js(),
86                )
87            }),
88        }
89    }
90
91    /// Checks whether this `ExternRef` can be used with the given context.
92    ///
93    /// Primitive (`i32`, `i64`, etc) and null funcref/externref values are not
94    /// tied to a context and can be freely shared between contexts.
95    ///
96    /// Externref and funcref values are tied to a context and can only be used
97    /// with that context.
98    #[inline]
99    pub fn is_from_store(&self, store: &impl AsStoreRef) -> bool {
100        match_rt!(on self => r {
101            r.is_from_store(store)
102        })
103    }
104}
